controls.control_objective: To ensure specifically ensure adherence with paragraphs 96, 134, 138, and 431 of these directions, and ensure that bank finance is not in lieu of or a substitut
controls.control_description:
While extending finance to Government owned entities, banks shall specifically
ensure adherence with paragraphs 96, 134, 138, and 431 of these Directions, and
ensure that bank finance is not in lieu of or a substitute for budgetary resources
envisaged for a project, and that finance is not extended against receivables from
Governments

to Micro, Small & Medium Enterprises (MSME) Sector.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be guided by master direction - lending to micro, small & medium enterprises (msme) sector

controls.control_objective: To ensure strengthen their financial position gradually so that they do not depend on the banks for finance against subsidy
controls.control_description:

measure and the fertilizer companies should strengthen their financial position
gradually so that they do not depend on the banks for finance against subsidy.

controls.control_objective: To ensure be financed by the bank
controls.control_description:

on the basis of expected revision in retention price because of escalation in
costs of inputs and in respect of freight, etc., shall be financed by the bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be financed by the bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed

shall continue to remain repealed.

taken, or initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall

to remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of
these Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary
